Chen Heng йҷіж©«
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Heng (йҷіж©«). Van leader with Xue Li under Liu Yao. Shot by Jiang Qin when ambushed by Sun Ce. Chen Heng may not have existed in history. Chen Heng was affiliated with Liu Yao. Chen Heng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
